data.name: Elf World Adventure 3
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY:




Elf World Adventure 3 is the continuation of an exciting H-game in the anime and puzzle genre. You’ll enjoy many levels where you need to collect illustrations of charming elf girls. Immerse yourself in a magical world with a splendid atmosphere and relaxing melodic music. The game will delight you not only with a variety of challenging and captivating puzzles but also with many beautiful achievements that you can use to decorate your profile, showcasing your successes in the world of elves.

BEAUTIFUL ACHIEVEMENTS:


GAME FEATURES:




  • Hentai Experience: Play a puzzle game with unique H-elements.
  • Enchanting Atmosphere: Immerse yourself in a magical world with soothing, beautiful music.
  • Casual Gameplay: Simple controls and an accessible interface make it enjoyable for everyone.
  • Beautiful Elf Girls: Discover stunning illustrations of elf girls.
  • Steam Achievements: Decorate your profile with vibrant rewards.
  • Multiple Levels: Dive into a world of captivating puzzles.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
